candidate_definition_hints.text: Managing Pull Requests and Issues For GitHub & GitHub Enterprise from the command line

A version of [Trailer](http://ptsochantaris.github.io/trailer/) that runs on the macOS & Linux command-line, can integrate into scripts, be used on remote servers, or simply used because consoles are cool. This version does not aim for feature parity with the mainstream Trailer …
